title: Notifications - Update Available
scenario: Verify that a "Update Available" notification appears when a device has outdated firmware and the Poly App is in the background, and tapping it redirects to Device Settings > Software Update.
steps: Ensure the device has a firmware version lower than the current version available on the Cloud server.
Ensure the Poly App is running in the background on the mobile device.
Wait for the 'Update Available' notification to appear.
Observe the app behavior after tapping the notification.
expected: The app opens and redirects the user to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
